title: scabiosa tomentosa var. weyleri
intro: Scabiosa tomentosa var. weyleri, also known as the Woolly Scabious or Weyleri Scabiosa, is a plant species within the genus Scabiosa. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are known to have health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, while also having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the Scabiosa tomentosa var. weyleri plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
